{{CargoOrgan
|name=Deathless Vessel
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10720
|idx=78
|description="Before the mountain of corpses, the Gate of the End slowly opened. A figure in pure white robes tore through the void. The heretics rejoiced in madness, chanting the prophecy of the world’s demise..."
— Demon King's Revelation
|skill=Before round start, mobilize all fighting spirit, causing the next attack to deal DMG equal to 220%, and increase this round's CRIT DMG by 50%!
|hp=3490
|def=296
|atk=203
|rush=222
|gene1=Per Xenoking Organ implanted, {race} HP +420
Xenoking Organs implanted: 7/7
|gene2=Snail Arena, Healing +24%
|gene3=Snail Arena, Water DMG +240
|gene4=For Round 1, DMG +10%
|gene5=Water DMG +120
|gene6=Snail Arena, DMG REDUC +8%
|gene7=Water DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
